name: Tennis Pro Tour
short_description: Tennis Pro Tour is an arcade-style tennis game with a top-down view, inspired by the gameplay of the 1989 Sega Master System game Tennis Ace.
detailed_description:
Tennis Pro Tour is an arcade-style tennis game with a top-down view. The gameplay is inspired by the 1989 Sega Master System game Tennis Ace.

Far from the usual tennis game standards, the old-school controls might make you sweat at first, but once you master them, get ready for fun on all surfaces!

Tennis Pro Tour features a career mode where you can participate in small local tournaments all the way up to Grand Slam events. But beware—fatigue will catch up with you, and you might be tempted to hire a fitness coach to improve your recovery.

Features:

  • Exhibition matches in singles or doubles

  • Academy mode to help you learn the game

  • 4 different court surfaces (clay, grass, hard, indoor)

  • Player creation

  • Career mode with 56 different tournaments across 4 tournament categories

  • 3 difficulty levels

  • Comprehensive ranking system

  • 20 achievements to unlock extra outfits/hairstyles

  • Training sessions as mini-games

  • Team World Cup (unlockable achievement)
